title: champaca fasciculata
intro: Champaca fasciculata, also known as yellow champak or yellow sandan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Olacaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Champaca fasciculata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues.
